item.title: This is personal to me, not because it affects my platform, which is why it is personal to him, but because I am a member of the...
item.description:
This is personal to me, not because it affects my platform, which is why it is personal to him, but because I am a member of the group that his rhetoric directly threatens the livelihood and fundamental rights of.

item.title: YESSSSSSSS LEAVEEEEE
